title: Rainy Day Planning: What to Do When You Do Not Have to Water
guidePromise: This guide helps early players turn rainy days into useful progress without treating every rainy day as a fixed route.
notes: Good follow-up to energy and tool timing. Avoid exact weather prediction claims.

title: Your First Sprinklers: When the Farm Starts Running Without You
guidePromise: This guide helps beginners understand when sprinklers change the daily schedule and when they are not worth forcing yet.
notes: Can link to existing sprinkler/scaling guide later. Avoid layout diagrams unless manually reviewed.

title: First Community Center Seasonal Check: What Not to Miss
guidePromise: This guide helps players check seasonal bundle risk without turning the Community Center into a rigid route.
notes: Use standard bundles only. Must verify examples against local bundles.json before production.

title: Early Foraging Habits That Make the First Season Easier
guidePromise: This guide helps new players decide what to pick up, save, sell, or convert into early options.
notes: Good internal-link candidate for forage data. Avoid exhaustive item table.

title: Backpack Upgrade Timing: When Inventory Space Is Worth the Money
guidePromise: This guide helps early players decide when inventory space is more valuable than seeds, tools, or buildings.
notes: Strong beginner decision topic. Avoid pretending there is one universal purchase day.

title: First Animal Building Decision: Why Comfort Matters More Than Rankings
guidePromise: This guide helps players decide whether an animal building fits their current routine before comparing profit.
notes: Do not publish profit ranking without verifying building and product costs.

title: Festival Planning for Beginners: How Events Change Your Week
guidePromise: This guide helps new players plan around festivals without losing crops, errands, or tool timing.
notes: Useful progression guide. Verify event dates before production examples.

title: First Winter Preparation: What to Set Up Before Crops Slow Down
guidePromise: This guide helps Year 1 players prepare for Winter as a planning season rather than a dead season.
notes: Good continuation after Fall prep. Avoid late-game or perfection routing.

title: Museum Donations in the Early Game: What to Donate, Save, or Sell
guidePromise: This guide helps early players think through museum donations without needing a complete artifact checklist.
recommendedStage: S7 candidate after local mineral/artifact data check
notes: Needs local data alignment because project has minerals but not a full artifact production module yet.

title: First Farm Layout Thinking: Paths, Crops, Machines, and Future Space
guidePromise: This guide helps beginners leave room for future systems without copying a layout template.
notes: No screenshots or copied layouts. Keep it conceptual and player-decision focused.
